docs.title: Ideas
docs.text:
Common (8)

Simple mechanics, beginner-friendly, mostly early-series versions.

Character Anime Notes Young Naruto Naruto Shadow Clones, Rasengan Kid Goku Dragon Ball Power Pole, Kamehameha Luffy (East Blue) One Piece Gum-Gum attacks Gon Freecss Hunter × Hunter Jajanken Deku (Season 1) My Hero Academia One For All punches Eren (Cadet) Attack on Titan ODM Gear mobility Edward Elric Fullmetal Alchemist Ground transmutation Denji Chainsaw Man Chainsaw attacks

Rare (4)

Characters with more specialized mechanics.

Character Anime Notes Kakashi Naruto Sharingan counters Zoro One Piece Triple sword combos Tanjiro Demon Slayer Water Breathing Yuji Itadori Jujutsu Kaisen Black Flash

Epic (4)

More iconic abilities and unique gameplay.

Character Anime Notes Vegeta (Super Saiyan) Dragon Ball Ki blasts & Final Flash Levi Ackerman Attack on Titan High mobility assassin Killua Hunter × Hunter Lightning speed Rengoku Demon Slayer Flame Breathing

Legendary (4)

Major fan favorites and late-game unlocks.

Character Anime Ichigo Kurosaki Bleach All Might My Hero Academia Yami Sukehiro Black Clover Trafalgar Law One Piece

Mythic (4)

Characters with game-changing mechanics.

Character Anime Itachi Uchiha Naruto Gojo Satoru Jujutsu Kaisen Aizen Bleach Sung Jin-Woo Solo Leveling

docs.title: Madara Uchiha
docs.text:
Naruto

Secret

docs.title: Passive
docs.text:
Sharingan

At the end of Madara's turn, he activates the Sharingan. The next enemy attack against him has 35% chance to be completely evaded. After a successful dodge, the effect is consumed until it activates again on a future turn.

  • Effect:
  • Duration:
  • Cooldown:

docs.title: Skill
docs.text:
Susanoo Slash

Whenever Madara collides with an enemy, he summons Susanoo to unleash a powerful slash. If Madara dodged an attack with Sharingan, his next Susanoo Slash will deal 25% more damage

  • Damage:
  • Range:
  • Area:
  • Cooldown:
  • Additional Effects:

docs.title: Ultimate
docs.text:
Tengai Shinsei

Madara summons a gigantic meteor that crashes onto the battlefield after a brief delay, devastating everything within its impact zone

Details * Damage: * Duration: * Area of Effect: * Cooldown / Cost: * Additional Effects:
